data.name: Pookie's Lingerie Shop
data.detailed_description:
Pookie's Lingerie Shop is a short and simple flirty lingerie shop dating sim with light management elements. As a corporate-assigned manager, you’ll work with the sharp-tongued Pookie, handle quirky customers, and meet the mysterious collection officer Regina. Your choices shape relationships and lead to multiple romantic paths. Will you boost sales and find love—or cause chaos in the shop?

  • Genre: Visual Novel + Dating Sim + Light Management

  • Setting: lingerie shop

  • Main Role: You’re sent by the corporation to help boost sales at a struggling store

  • Core Loop:

    • Serve customers and grow the shop’s reputation

    • Make key dialogue choices that influence relationships

    • Manage shop performance to unlock story events

  • Romance Paths:

    • Build trust with characters through work, events, and dates

    • Two main romance routes, each with their own tone and twists

data.short_description: A lighthearted lingerie shop management dating sim where work, romance, and playful banter collide.
data.reviews:
“간단한 란제리숍 경영 야게임. 취향 맞으신분은 한번 고민해 보세요.”
[KOR] Hong-Gil-Dong 19금 게임리뷰

“Shop management dating sim with VN element. The routes depend on your choice for the dialogue. Unique cute anime artwork, w/partly animated. Various lingerie.”
RRMY

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: intel only
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
